entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop, specifically the Kabuli variety ICCV 6

entities.description: A specific variety of Kabuli chickpea derived from pedigree selection

entities.description: A breeding method used to derive ICCV 6

entities.description: A selection method performed in the F2-F6 generations

entities.description: The growth habit of the ICCV 6 variety

entities.name: MODERATE HEIGHT
entities.description: The height characteristic of the ICCV 6 variety

entities.name: BASAL BRANCHING
entities.description: The branching pattern of the ICCV 6 variety

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The period between sowing and flowering, varying by region

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the plant to reach maturity, 130-170 days

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: A region where ICCV 6 flowers in 60-70 days

entities.name: NORTHERN INDIA
entities.description: A region where ICCV 6 flowers in 75-85 days

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of ICCV 6, averaging 2.04 t/ha

entities.description: A fungal pathogen to which ICCV 6 is resistant

entities.description: A disease condition to which ICCV 6 is tolerant

entities.description: A pest to which ICCV 6 is tolerant

entities.name: SOIL SALINITY
entities.description: An environmental stress to which ICCV 6 is tolerant

entities.name: NODULATION CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of the plant to form root nodules

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Water-managed environments suited for ICCV 6

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Rain-dependent environments suited for ICCV 6

entities.name: LATE SOWING
entities.description: A planting timing condition to which ICCV 6 is adapted

entities.name: SEED COLOR
entities.description: The color of the seeds, described as salmon-white

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, averaging 20 g

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
